nodes.text: You've scanned my ID. Is there a problem with it?

responses.text: Just routine verification. Can you confirm your date of birth?
I need to ask about your prescription.
I'm looking into the prescriber details.
That matches. Question about your prescriber—
That's all I needed. One moment.

nodes.text: The oxycodone. Dr. Gail Rosen. I've been under her care for two years. The injury is documented. I've filled this prescription many times at my regular pharmacy.

responses.text: I'm not finding any fill history at this location.
The prescriber's NPI is showing as inactive.

nodes.text: Dr. Gail Rosen. NPI should be on the prescription printout.

responses.text: The NPI doesn't resolve to an active prescriber.

nodes.text: That's expected. I've never been to this pharmacy before. My records are in Whitmore.

responses.text: We can request a transfer but I also need to verify the prescriber NPI.

nodes.text: There must be an error in your database. She's been my physician for two years.
